source_preflight.notes: Nodes: Enter loop, Condition True?, Run body, After loop, Nested loop (ghost note). Labels all <=4 words, bold, italic palette subtitles. Concepts map to corpus: while test->body->back-to-test / exit on False (5.1), break jumps to exit + continue jumps to test (5.6), nested inner-runs-fully-per-outer-pass (5.7). Uses only loops + conditionals + prior 1.x — no forward-referenced concepts.

visual_inspection.performed_by: orchestrator main-thread (rendered PNG via npx @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli, then read the image)
visual_inspection.reason: PNG rendered at -w 1400 -b transparent (32.8KB) and visually inspected. Nodes readable, no truncation, no overlap. Flow correct: Enter loop -> Condition True? (diamond); True -> Run body; solid 'loop back' body->test; False -> After loop; dotted 'break' body->exit; dotted 'continue' body->test; 'Nested loop' ghost note dotted to body. Palette consistent (blue start/act, purple decision, green done, purple ghost).
findings: Minor: 'loop back' (solid) and 'continue' (dotted) arrows both run body->test and their labels sit close — still distinguishable by line style; not blocking.

verdict: PASS on source pre-flight (parse OK, 5 nodes, label + concept fidelity clean); visual PNG check deferred — render unavailable.
